creator: me@enriquefynn.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #3)

I'm not so sure I understood the grouping, If I put the options in a OPTIONS_GROUP
it's gonna be the same as having each option independently, no?

What I wanted to do but I couldn't manage is have just one option that allows all the other ones (Utilities), showing each of the other options as a suboption with its respectively description.
